subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove an interviewer from the platform, please note that the integration with calendar apps only synchronizes the details about who generated the interview and a timestamp for when it was generated. You can add or remove attendees prior to the interview and still be able to use the same link. Alternatively, you can try generating a new interview link and adding the new attendees.
